title: Update Services page with 6 categories, sub-items, and sample pictures

requirements.summary: Update ServicesPage to display exactly 6 service categories with sub-items, descriptions, and sample images
acceptanceCriteria: Exactly 6 service category sections are displayed on the Services page.
Each category shows its correct title and full sub-item list as specified.
Each category card displays a relevant sample image loaded from frontend/public/assets/generated/.
Offset Printing section includes the descriptive tagline about cost-effective bulk printing.
Each category card includes a 'Get a Quote' CTA button linking to the quotation request page.
Layout is responsive and consistent across mobile and desktop views.

file_operations.description: Replace the current 4-service layout with a 6-service category grid. Add complete service data for: (1) Design Services with 6 sub-items (Logo Design, Brand Identity, Marketing Materials, Social Media Graphics, Packaging Design, Photo Editing) and image service-design.dim_800x500.png; (2) Digital Printing with 6 sub-items (Business Cards, Flyers & Brochures, Posters, Letterheads, Envelopes, Books) and image service-digital-printing.dim_800x500.png; (3) Outdoor Printing with 4 sub-items (Flex Banners, Star Flex, Signboards, Canvas) and image service-outdoor-printing.dim_800x500.png; (4) Indoor Printing with 7 sub-items (Stickers Die-cut, Stickers with backing variants, Transparent Stickers, Vinyl Printing, Indoor Banners, Canvas Prints, Posters) and image service-indoor-printing.dim_800x500.png; (5) Screen Printing & Personalization with 5 sub-items (Pen Printing, T-Shirt Printing, Balloon Printing, Sublimation Printing, DTF Printing) and image service-screen-printing.dim_800x500.png; (6) Offset Printing with description 'Cost-effective bulk printing with consistent quality for large volume orders' and 5 sub-items (Magazines, Catalogs, Books, Packaging/Cardboard Boxes, Paper Bags) and image service-offset-printing.dim_800x500.png. Reference all images using the workspace path frontend/public/assets/generated/<filename>. Each category card must include the category title, sub-item list, sample image, and a 'Get a Quote' button that navigates to /quotation-request. Maintain responsive grid layout and bilingual support using the BilingualText component and translation system.

requirements.summary: Wire the 6 generated service category sample images as static assets in the frontend
acceptanceCriteria: All 6 service category images are placed in frontend/public/assets/generated/ with the correct filenames.
Each image is displayed in the corresponding service category card on the Services page.
Images load correctly without broken links.

file_operations.description: Ensure all 6 service category images are correctly referenced with their full workspace paths: frontend/public/assets/generated/service-design.dim_800x500.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/service-digital-printing.dim_800x500.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/service-outdoor-printing.dim_800x500.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/service-indoor-printing.dim_800x500.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/service-screen-printing.dim_800x500.png, and frontend/public/assets/generated/service-offset-printing.dim_800x500.png. Use the standard img tag with proper alt text for accessibility. Verify images render without 404 errors and maintain aspect ratio across different viewport sizes.
